summary: Iteration 82: AgriBooks Money-Out Flow Bug Fix Verification - All 6 bug fixes verified via pytest tests and code review. Bugs fixed: (1) Return void now ADDS money back, (2) Daily close uses cashier-only expenses, (3) Payable payment creates expense + updates PO, (4) Expense stores fund_source, (5) PO safe_lot schema corrected, (6) Invoice payment void handles digital wallets.

test_results.BUG 1 - Return void adds money back: PASS (Code Review) - Line 359: update_cashier_wallet with POSITIVE refund_amount adds money back
test_results.BUG 2 - Daily close cashier-only expense: PASS - Response includes total_cashier_expenses (3900.0), total_safe_expenses (0.0), total_cash_ar, total_digital_ar
test_results.BUG 3 - Payable payment flow: PASS - Wallet deducted (₱12475→₱12375), expense created (8→9), PO updated
test_results.BUG 4 - Expense stores fund_source: PASS - Created expense with fund_source='cashier' correctly stored
test_results.BUG 5 - PO safe_lot schema: PASS (Code Review) - safe_lots.insert_one includes branch_id, wallet_id, date_received, original_amount, remaining_amount
test_results.BUG 6 - Invoice void handles digital: PASS (Code Review) - void_invoice_payment checks is_digital_payment() and calls update_digital_wallet()

critical_code_review_comments: returns.py Line 336-377: void_return correctly adds refund_amount BACK to fund (was previously subtracting)
daily_operations.py Lines 260-264, 308-309: expected_counter formula now uses total_cashier_expenses instead of total_expenses
daily_operations.py Lines 302-306: AR payments correctly split into total_cash_ar and total_digital_ar
daily_operations.py Lines 835-850, 1100-1140: close_day and batch_close use same corrected cashier-only formula
accounting.py Lines 513-570: create_expense accepts and stores fund_source, deducts from correct wallet
accounting.py Lines 1174-1308: pay_payable rewritten to always deduct wallet, create expense, update linked PO
purchase_orders.py Line 791: safe_lot schema has all required fields (branch_id, wallet_id, date_received, original_amount, remaining_amount)
invoices.py Lines 1055-1079: void_invoice_payment checks for digital fund_source and uses update_digital_wallet
seed_data_creation: Test expense created and voided for bug 4 verification. Payable payment made for bug 3 verification.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 82 verified all 6 money-out flow bug fixes via pytest and code review. KEY FORMULAS VERIFIED: (1) expected_counter = starting_float + total_cash_in - total_cashier_expenses (only cashier expenses, not safe), (2) total_cash_in = total_cash_sales + total_partial_cash + total_cash_ar + total_split_cash (cash AR only, not digital AR), (3) Return void ADDS money back to fund by calling update_cashier_wallet with positive amount, (4) Payable payment creates expense record so it appears in Z-Report. All tests passed.

BUG_1.fix: void_return now calls update_cashier_wallet(branch_id, refund_amount, ref_text) with POSITIVE amount to ADD money back
BUG_1.previous_bug: Was calling with -refund_amount which double-deducted from fund

BUG_2.fix: expected_counter uses total_cashier_expenses (safe expenses excluded) and total_cash_ar (digital AR excluded)
BUG_2.previous_bug: Was using total_expenses which included safe-paid expenses that don't affect cashier drawer

BUG_3.fix: pay_payable deducts from wallet, creates expense in expenses collection, updates linked PO payment_history
BUG_3.previous_bug: Was not creating expense record, so supplier payments didn't appear in Z-Report

BUG_4.fix: create_expense accepts fund_source parameter and stores it on expense document
BUG_4.previous_bug: fund_source was not being stored, defaulting to empty or undefined

BUG_5.fix: safe_lots.insert_one includes all required fields: branch_id, wallet_id, date_received, original_amount, remaining_amount
BUG_5.previous_bug: Schema was missing some required fields

BUG_6.fix: void_invoice_payment checks for fund_source=='digital' or is_digital_payment(pmt_method) and calls update_digital_wallet
BUG_6.previous_bug: Was not handling digital payments, only deducting from cashier
